name: DeepSeek-R1-Zero
archDisplay: DeepSeekMoE: 256 routed + 1 shared expert, top-8 routing, 61 layers (3 dense + 58 MoE), Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA)
note: Trained by pure large-scale RL on V3-Base with no SFT cold start; first open proof reasoning can emerge from RL alone, but suffers repetition/readability/language-mixing issues.
tpsNote: Same 671B MoE footprint as DeepSeek-R1; does not fit a single 24GB 4090 even at Q4, and community quantization interest has been lower than for the instruction-tuned R1.
